pages.title: Feverbreak
pages.tagline: Noble resolve in a medieval storm.

pages.body: Step into the silent arena where gratitude blooms amidst chaos. This medium-tempo D minor saga weaves tense string ostinatos with a soaring violin lead, supported by aggressive viola and cello rhythms. Restrained French horns build quiet pressure while sharp brass accents punctuate the air like distant warhorns. Militaristic percussion drives the narrative forward through snare rolls and timpani strikes without ever breaking the loopable tactical cadence. It is an orchestral storm that feels ancient yet urgent, capturing the essence of a decisive medieval fantasy battle where every note serves as both shield and sword.
pages.styleSentence: A medium-tempo (99 BPM) D minor orchestral battle theme featuring tense string ostinatos, a dramatic violin lead melody supported by aggressive viola and cello rhythms, restrained French horns, sharp brass accents, and militaristic percussion including snare rolls and timpani strikes to evoke a noble yet dangerous medieval fantasy war drama.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking. Never misses a downbeat.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Rolls out ancient signals for the charge ahead.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Paints invisible maps with shimmering digital hues.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Weaves atmospheric shadows around every heroic step.

members.name: KEYS
members.bio: Chords bloom like flowers in frozen battlefields.

members.name: STRINGS
members.bio: Tug at heartstrings with noble, minor-key resolve.

members.name: BRASS
members.bio: Blasts defiant trumpets to rally the weary ranks.

levels.name: SNARE SHADOW
levels.emotion: Anticipatory tension with sparse strings and militaristic snare preparation.

levels.name: MINOR RESOLVE
levels.emotion: Noble resolve emerging from the minor-key ostinato foundation.

levels.name: VIOLIN SOAR
levels.emotion: Dramatic violin melody soaring over aggressive viola and cello rhythms.

levels.name: HORN PRESSURE
levels.emotion: Restrained French horns building pressure for the climax without modern drumming.

levels.name: BRASS CLASH
levels.emotion: Aggressive brass accents and timpani strikes hitting peak heroic tension.

levels.name: FADE LOOP
levels.emotion: Fading cinematic resolve returning to the loopable tactical theme.
